form.formComment: Three-year-old colt by Tall Dark Stranger out of Gooddealehemily having his first start. Finished seventh in a trial on April 7 at Melton over 2240m. Respect any move in betting.

formComments.comment: Three-year-old colt by Tall Dark Stranger out of Gooddealehemily having his first start. Finished seventh in a trial on April 7 at Melton over 2240m. Respect any move in betting.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth after showing early speed, behind Bite The Ear Mike at Mildura over 1790m in a MAIDEN on March 20 at $1.90. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing second after being driven well back, behind Miss Doobee at Shepparton over 1690m in a MAIDEN on March 24 at $3.80. Has the ability to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out and paced roughly near the 1000m.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding by Soho Tribeca out of Miss Sweethart on debut. Showed ability when he won at Melton in a trial on April 7 over 2240m. A bit of a push for him in early discussions is worth noting.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding by Poster Boy out of Yannarie having his first start. Won a trial on March 31 at Melton over 1720m. Profiles nicely but betting will hold the key.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Three-year-old gelding by Poster Boy out of Yannarie having his first start. Won a trial on March 31 at Melton over 1720m. Profiles nicely but betting will hold the key.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1755m at Echuca, beaten 21 m by Pearl Of Philtra (2:09.20) in MAIDEN on April 5 at $26. Two runs back 8th (Fr1) over 1690m after showing early pace at Shepparton was 5th-5.94 at the bell, beaten 19 m by Miss Doobee (2:02.30) in MAIDEN on March 24 at $9.50. This appears outside her grasp.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced near the 300m when Little Rain Cloud began to give ground.
Hung in under pressure and contacted marker pegs in the home straight.
Shifted out under pressure over the final 200m.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of five months. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 4 m finishing third behind Bay La Ville at Kilmore over 1690m in a 2yo MAIDEN on November 13 at $1.65. Genuine contender in this suitable contest.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run she surrendered the lead and finished 5th (Fr1) over 1690m after showing early pace at Shepparton was 4th-11.5m on the pegs at the bell, beaten 15 m by Alot Like Jeannie (2:05.90) in 2yo 0-1 WIN on June 3 at $18. Finds a nice race to launch the campaign.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly by Rock N Roll Heaven out of Miss Dilly on debut. Finished third at Bacchus Marsh in a trial on February 28 over 1940m. Betting will prove to be the best guide
